description_long: This is a white sculpted bust of a young person, featuring delicate facial features and wavy hair. The bust is unfinished below the shoulders, with a rough, chiseled texture that contrasts with the smoothness of the face and neck. The sculpture sits on a broad, irregularly shaped base that appears to be part of the same material. The back of the head and shoulders are smoothly rounded, with subtle detailing in the hair. The overall form is classical, evoking traditional Greco-Roman portraiture. A small plaque or signage is visible on the base, suggesting it may be displayed in a formal or public setting.
description: A white classical bust of a young person with detailed facial features and wavy hair, set on a rough, irregular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, wavy hair, and unfinished, rough-textured chest and shoulders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the hair, and the irregular base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the head and shoulders, with minimal detailing and a broad base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair texture, and the rough, unfinished lower section.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a flat surface with a visible plaque, suggesting an indoor gallery or museum setting.
